appearances: bright beadwork and a battered leather satchel
scarred arms and a necklace of dinosaur teeth
painted wooden charms hanging from their belt
a wide-brimmed hat soaked from the humidity
personalities: blunt, practical and hard to impress
secrets: knows of a ruined trail inland
is quietly working with the Harpers
hooks: needs help finding a missing relative
can guide the party for a price
knows a rumour about an ancient idol
saw smoke from a hidden camp
has a map fragment but does not trust strangers
